binds.description: Full set of National Park Service inspection photographs documenting the reflecting pool damage, including liner cuts, sealant delamination, and coating failure patterns.
binds.release_basis: Assumed to be released via FOIA or administrative disclosure.
binds.note: Visual evidence is staged as an evidence expansion payload. It does not independently resolve causation unless source files, hashes, photo metadata, and context are later bound.

relevance: May clarify visual scale of deliberate liner cuts versus systemic renovation or coating failure.
May help compare alleged fertilizer-related algae causation against pre-existing water chemistry, coating, or maintenance factors.
May support or contradict the scope of damage described by official statements and reporting.

claim_effect.reason: Photo evidence payload is pending source-file binding and does not yet resolve causation or scale questions.

open_questions_preserved: Exact scale of deliberate cuts versus renovation wear or systemic coating failure.
Causation of algae bloom: fertilizer introduction versus water chemistry, coating chemistry, or maintenance failures.
Full release and hashing of inspection photos, surveillance, court filings, and administrative documentation.
